zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bagot of Bromley於1314年出生在英國斯塔福爾布利費爾德時，他的父親Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley30歲，母親Lucy de Mountjoy22歲。他於大約1332年與Eglina d'Oyley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年在英國斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bagot of Bromley于1314年出生在英国斯塔福爾布利費爾德时，他的父亲Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley30岁，母亲Lucy de Mountjoy22岁。他于大约1332年与Eglina d'Oyley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年在英国斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bagot of Bromley was born in 1314, in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley, was 30 and his mother, Lucy de Mountjoy, was 22. He married Eglina d'Oyley about 1332, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1349, in Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bagot of Bromley est né en 1314, à Blithfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Mountjoy, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eglina d'Oyley environ 1332, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1349, à Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England,: Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Bagot of Bromley 1314 in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley 30 und seine Mutter Lucy de Mountjoy 22. Er hat um 1332 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Eglina d'Oyley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bagot of Bromley è nato il nel 1314 nel Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Mountjoy, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eglina d'Oyley circa 1332, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1349, nel Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bagot of Bromleyが1314年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromleyは30歳，母Lucy de Mountjoyは22歳であった。約1332年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでEglina d'Oyleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアボツ ブロムリーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bagot of Bromley(이)가 1314년 영국 스태퍼드실르 블리스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Mountjoy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Eglina d'Oyley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 영국 스태퍼드실르 애벗스 브롬리에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bagot of Bromley nasceu em 1314, em Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Mountjoy, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eglina d'Oyley aproximadamente 1332, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1349, em Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bagot of Bromley родился в 1314 г. в местности блитфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Mountjoy, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eglina d'Oyley около 1332 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1349 г. в местности эббоц бромли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Bagot of Bromley nació en 1314, en Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bagot, Lord of Bromley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lucy de Mountjoy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eglina d'Oyley aproximadamente 1332, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1349, en Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
